name: Wide-Leg Cargo Sweatpants
description:
Heavyweight fleece/jersey fabric in black, soft hand feel with durable structure.
Relaxed full-length wide-leg fit with elasticated waistband; angled front slash pockets, oversized asymmetrical flap cargo pockets, and rear patch pockets with flap detail.
Visible seam piping and panel lines for a structured utilitarian look; reinforced pocket construction for daily wear.
Customizable in fabric colors, prints, trims, and logo placement on legs, pockets, or back.
Sizes XXS–XXL; MOQ 100 pcs.

name: Custom Color-Block Performance Shorts
description:
Lightweight polyester knit construction with a split color-block layout: light gray on the left side and teal on the right side.
Elastic waistband, hemmed leg openings, smooth front paneling with no visible pockets, and athletic fit for unrestricted movement and durable daily wear.
Customizable colors, sublimated numbers, wordmarks, and logos on front and back panels.
Available in youth and adult sizing.
MOQ: 10 units.

name: Lightweight Snap-Front Coach Jacket
description:
Lightweight matte nylon-like outer fabric with smooth lining.
Classic coach jacket fit with point collar, full snap-button front, elastic cuffs, straight hem, and adjustable drawcord for a secure fit and easy layering.
Durable construction with reinforced seams; custom colors, solid or all-over prints, and logo placement on chest, back, or sleeves.
Sizes: XS–3XL.
MOQ: 50 pcs.

name: Crewneck Sweatshirt with Raglan Sleeves
description:
Custom crewneck sweatshirt in performance knit or fleece fabric with ribbed collar, cuffs, and hem.
Raglan sleeve fit allows ease of movement; durable construction with full-print sublimation and rib trim.
Customizable colors, sleeve graphics, chest logo, lower front text, and wordmark pattern on bottom band.
Available in youth and adult sizes.
MOQ: 10 pieces.

name: Short-Sleeve Crew Neck Athletic T-Shirt with Asymmetrical Color Block
description:
Lightweight performance polyester fabric with moisture-wicking construction.
Short-sleeve crew neck fit with an asymmetrical dark charcoal, light gray, and medium gray color-block front; curved chest band and angled shoulder/chest streaks; built for training, team wear, and repeated wash use.
Custom colors, full sublimation or printed graphics, and logo placement on chest, sleeves, back, or neck.
Sizes available from youth to adult plus sizes.
MOQ: 10 pieces.

name: Loose-Fit Cropped Jersey T-Shirt
description:
Smooth knit jersey fabric in a soft pastel lavender color.
Loose fit with cropped length, wide boat neckline, dropped shoulders, elbow-length oversized sleeves, plain front, and slightly uneven hem; built for comfort and easy movement with clean seam construction for durability.
Customizable in colors, all-over or placed prints, and logo placement on front, back, or sleeves.
Sizes: XS–XXL.
MOQ: 50 pcs.

name: Short-Sleeve Camp-Collar Button-Up Shirt with Tropical Beach Print

Short-sleeve camp-collar button-up fit with curved hem, rolled sleeve cuffs, breathable comfort, and colorfast durability.
Customizable base colors, full-print artwork, and logo placement on chest, sleeve, back, or hem.

name: Pullover Performance Hoodie with Patterned Sleeves

Available with custom colors, all-over prints, sleeve/hood patterns, and logo or text placement on chest, sleeves, hood, and back.

Full-zip design with attached hood and matching drawcords, long sleeves, ribbed cuffs and hem, and split kangaroo front pockets; regular fit for everyday wear and durable rib trim for shape retention.
Custom options include color changes, all-over or panel prints, and logo placement on chest, sleeve, back, or hood.
